intent_head: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.outcome_justification: Context date is 2026-03-30. Cast birthday scan showed the nearest upcoming birthday date as 05-21, and the canonical cast file 10_entities/cast/tobias.md provides the exact entity name Tobias Kern for that date.
